query:
SELECT cg.id as groupId, cg.name as groupName, cg.maxQuantity, cg.productId, p.name as productName,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM complementItems ci WHERE ci.groupId = cg.id AND ci.isActive = 1) as activeItemsCount
FROM complementGroups cg 
JOIN products p ON p.id = cg.productId 
WHERE p.establishmentId = 60018 AND cg.name = 'Adicionais'
ORDER BY cg.maxQuantity DESC
LIMIT 10;
